title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils for Those with Hormonal Imbalances Suffering from Oily Hair
description: Rosmarinus officinalis essential oils, also known as rosemary essential oil, can be a helpful remedy for oily hair. This is because rosemary oil has astringent and antiseptic properties, which help to balance the scalp's natural oil production. The main constituents of rosemary oil, including camphor, bornyl acetate, and borneol, work together to reduce sebum production and tighten the hair follicles, resulting in a healthier and more balanced scalp.
